name: Cross-audience foundations
when_to_use: Design a documentation system, mode taxonomy, IA, versioning model, accessibility baseline, or feedback loop

name: Developer docs site
when_to_use: Design the quickstart, reference, tutorial, troubleshooting, or developer search structure

name: README front door
when_to_use: Design the README and first-impressions surface

name: Changelog and release notes
when_to_use: Design the changelog format, breaking-change callouts, and release-notes surface

name: Contributor onboarding docs
when_to_use: Design CONTRIBUTING.md, onboarding docs, and PR templates

name: Examples and samples
when_to_use: Design the samples surface: per-language examples, sample repos, snippet CI

name: End-user help
when_to_use: Design in-product help, onboarding guidance, empty states, tooltips, help center IA, or UX microcopy

name: API and tool contracts
when_to_use: Design machine-readable API/tool documentation, structured errors, examples, retry semantics, or metadata

name: Audience conflicts
when_to_use: Design a resolution when human docs and agent docs pull in different directions
